expectations.text: Did NOT write impl code (only contract sentinels + behavioral umbrella)
expectations.evidence: src/types.py — fetch_links raises NotImplementedError. Protocol + exceptions only.

NO separate .UNSTATED.md file exists. 13 inferences are embedded in spec.md as a 'Inferred decisions (UNSTATED)' table. Sweep-as-distinct-artifact discipline absent — the inferences sit inside the same doc reviewers approve, making them easy to skim past.
Assertion requires .UNSTATED.md. Baseline put 13 inferences in spec.md table instead. By content count would pass; by artifact discipline fails.

expectations.text: .UNSTATED.md or asked questions cover at least 2 of: timeout, link definition, redirect handling, encoding, network failure, output format, relative-vs-absolute URLs
